case_title: RUBIN LIOR et al VS N.J & ASSOCIATES INC.

docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $3,074.00 FILED BY RUBIN LIOR RUBIN KAREN AS TO DEFENDANT N.J & ASSOCIATES INC. ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR APR-23-1992 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 05
CLAIM OF DEFENDANT FOR $3,628.25 FILED BY N.J & ASSOCIATES INC. AS TO CROSS DEFENDANT RUBIN LIOR RUBIN KAREN ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR APR-23-1992 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 05
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVED AS TO DEFENDANT N.J & ASSOCIATES INC.
THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF RUBIN LIOR RUBIN KAREN IS NOT OWED ANY MONEY BY DEFENDANT N.J & ASSOCIATES INC. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS

PARTIES WAIVE SERVICE ON DEFENDANT'S CLAIM. THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT CROSS COMPLAINANT N.J & ASSOCIATES INC. RECOVER FROM CROSS DEFENDANT RUBIN LIOR RUBIN KAREN $2,900.00 PRINCIPAL, TOTAL JUDGMENT $2,900.00, SOFA LOVESEAT AND CHAIR TO BE DELIVERED TO PLTF'S STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
CORRECTION NOTICE SENT TO D BRADY
ACKNOWLEDGMENT OF SATISFACTION OF JUDGMENT AS TO DEFENDANT N.J & ASSOCIATES INC.
